#  Edit a Budget 
##  Background 
There are several ways to make changes to a project's budget. The tasks that you can perform depend on where you are in the budgeting process and whether the budget is locked or unlocked.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * Refer to the 'Things to Consider' sections in the tutorials listed under Steps below.
  * **For companies using the ERP Integrations tool:**
    * The budget must be locked to export it to an integrated ERP system. See [Lock a Budget](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/tutorials/lock-a-budget).


##  Steps 
  * Edit an Unlocked Budget  
OR
  * Edit a Locked Budget


### Edit an Unlocked Budget
  * [Add a Budget Line Item](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/resource-tracking-and-project-financials-setup-guide/add-a-budget-line-item)
  * [Create Budget Changes](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/resource-tracking-and-project-financials-setup-guide/record-changes-on-an-internal-budget-change)
  * [Delete a Budget Line Item](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/tutorials/delete-a-budget-line-item)
  * [Use the Forecast to Complete Feature](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/tutorials/use-the-forecast-to-complete-feature)


### Edit a Locked Budget
  * [Add a Budget Line Item](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/resource-tracking-and-project-financials-setup-guide/add-a-budget-line-item)
  * [Create Budget Changes](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/resource-tracking-and-project-financials-setup-guide/record-changes-on-an-internal-budget-change)
  * [Delete a Budget Line Item](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/tutorials/delete-a-budget-line-item)


## See Also
  * [Budget - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/permissions)
  * [What is a partial budget line item?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-a-partial-budget-line-item)
  * [Edit Budget Changes](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/budget-project/tutorials/edit-budget-changes)
title: Edit a Budget
description: How to update a budget using the project's Budget tool.
